issues.sample: THE ENGINE OVERHEATS EVEN IN 50 DEGREE FAHRENHEIT. THE GAUGE INDICATES 4 OR 5 BAR ALL THE TIME AND FAN STARTS ON 5 AND SWITCH TO OFF ON 4 AND KEEP DOING IT. THERE COULD BE PROBLEM WITH RADIATOR.

narrative.headline: What 2017 Kawasaki Ninja 650 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 1 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Engine (100% of reports).
